subcodes.first_line: O ye two sincere servants of the Blessed Beauty! Praise be to God that ye are guardians at the threshold of Divine Unity, with hearts drawn to that ancient realm [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق جمال مبارک الحمد لله درگاه احدیت را پاسبانید و سر باستان منجذب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God
